dairy: 💡 Store milk in back of fridge (coldest spot)!
💡 Cheese lasts longer wrapped in wax paper!
💡 Freeze yogurt in ice cube trays for smoothies!
💡 Keep butter away from direct light!
💡 Sour cream stays fresh longer if stored upside down!
produce: 💡 Keep bananas separate (they ripen other fruit)!
💡 Store carrots in damp paper towel in fridge!
💡 Potatoes prefer cool, dark, dry places!
meat: 💡 Freeze meat within 2 days of purchase!
💡 Thaw meat in fridge, not counter!
💡 Store raw meat on bottom shelf!
💡 Keep cooked meat separate from raw!
💡 Use meat within 1-2 days after thawing!
bread: 💡 Freeze bread to extend life by weeks!
💡 Store bread in cool, dry place (not fridge)!
💡 Revive stale bread in oven (350°F, 5 min)!
💡 Toast frozen bread directly from freezer!
💡 Keep bread in airtight container to prevent molding!
condiments: 💡 Store ketchup in fridge after opening!
💡 Hot sauce lasts months in fridge!
💡 Peanut butter is fine at room temperature!
beverages: 💡 Keep juice in back of fridge (coldest)!
💡 Wine keeps longer if stored on side!
💡 Opened soda goes flat—use within 2-3 days!
💡 Freeze overripe juice for later use!
snacks: 💡 Chips stay crispy in original bag!
💡 Popcorn stays fresh in sealed container!
frozen: 💡 Wrap items to prevent freezer burn!
general: 💡 First in, first out (FIFO) is your friend!
💡 Keep fridge clean to prevent odors!
